subject: [ACTION NEEDED] Have you donated yet?

| Friend,

We're now less than one month out from the first presidential debate. And with so many people in the race, it's now urgently clear: **not every candidate will earn a spot on that stage.**

One criterion the DNC will use to determine who goes on stage--in June and beyond--is the number of individual grassroots donors a campaign has.

We'll be straight with you: We set a goal of adding 10,000 new donors this month, but we haven't hit our goal yet. And time is running out.

[**_Friend, we 're still waiting on you to make your first gift to this campaign. Please--will you chip in just $1 today to put us in a solid place before the first debate?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771624/691c9bd/6c19f355/11a4f1aa/2257263321/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-65kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190528_FTH_20190528-fr-FTH-urgentbump-ndnrnop_ndnrnop_l1&recurring=auto&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Thank you,

The Finance Team (Dan, Brendan, Tonya, Sarah, Erica, Mark, Caroline, and Michael)

name: Kamala Harris
subject: I hope I make you proud at tonight's town hall
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
body:
|
#
I am getting ready for tonight's live _MSNBC_ town hall in Spartanburg, South Carolina. I hope what you see tonight makes you proud of this movement we’re building together. The American people deserve truth and integrity from their elected leaders. That’s not what we’re getting from this president. Tonight, we will speak honestly about the big challenges we face as a nation and the bold action we’re going to take to solve them. I’m running to serve as the next President of the United States because I believe we are better than this. If you’re with me, I could really use your help building our campaign from the ground up. **Rush a contribution to our campaign tonight to show you're in my corner. | Dear Friend,

As we make our final push we've learned a lot; mostly about just how committed establishment pollsters, often owned by the very same people who own everything and profit off war, are to keeping us off their tallies.

That's because of this: when our message is heard, it resonates. Online straw polls, though unofficial and much less than scientific (Nate Silver probably won't have 'em on his tracker), give us a chance to let them know there's a constituency for our message.

[Click here to vote in the Daily Kos' poll now and let them know we're here](https://mikegravel.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4840f01d672bb468321c6d3b8&id=898dd74ac1&e=85f7472d66).

subject: Now is the time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger For Congress
body:
This might intimidate other campaigns, but we know this grassroots team is up for the fight.
| | Peter --

We have just two days to get our campaign fundraising in a strong position to go toe-to-toe with any potential challengers. | [**_If you don 't have time to read our full email, you can make a donation toward our $6,500 May goal here. >>_**](https://act.myngp.com/el/TEk8ydanjEYRv00O-xqgJZ0yLJJ6Ua_taVasW9nOl_Q=/RIIA5UwsAD_C7L_7HjgWh-x3tX05JJgrRfbTvdvLVA4=?refcode=em_fr_2019.05.29_b1_ts_all&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,1000,2800) | ******[CONTRIBUTE »](https://act.myngp.com/el/TEk8ydanjEYRv00O-xqgJZ0yLJJ6Ua_taVasW9nOl_Q=/RIIA5UwsAD_C7L_7HjgWh-x3tX05JJgrRfbTvdvLVA4=?refcode=em_fr_2019.05.29_b1_ts_all&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,1000,2800)******
---
**We know it 's frustrating to receive fundraising emails this early in the cycle -- trust us, we don't like writing them either -- but the reality is that elections are expensive. **

While it may seem as though Abigail's re-election is still far away, now is the time to build up the resources we need to invest in an infrastructure that can go the distance. Unfortunately, our political system encourages candidates to compromise what's good for the people in exchange for campaign cash from corporate PACs -- _**something Abigail has vowed never to do.**_

She knows that rejecting corporate PAC money isn't enough -- which is why she voted for a historic government reform package to end Washington's corruption and fix our broken campaign finance system.

In Abigail's first months in Congress, she has proven time and again that her priority is putting Central Virginia families first: protecting health care for those with pre-existing conditions, lowering the cost of prescription drugs, pushing for high-speed internet across VA-07, and guaranteeing LGBT Americans equal protection under the law.

Abigail's record of working for the people is exactly why the same special interests and outside groups who dropped millions on our district in 2018 have recommitted to defeating her this time around.

**That might intimidate other campaigns, but we know this grassroots team is up for the fight --_and we 're incredibly grateful for that._**
**[Peter, can you help us out before our end-of-month deadline by chipping in today? We have just two days to raise $6,500. Since Abigail is rejecting all corporate PAC donations, we're relying on donations of any size from you to reach our critical May goal. >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/TEk8ydanjEYRv00O-xqgJZ0yLJJ6Ua_taVasW9nOl_Q=/RIIA5UwsAD_C7L_7HjgWh-x3tX05JJgrRfbTvdvLVA4=?refcode=em_fr_2019.05.29_b1_ts_all&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,1000,2800)**

body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/7116773/66481539/-1369401587?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODVmM2JlMy0yYzgyLWU5MTEtYWJjNC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VfJ2XEwO8VoQmY_3kIoMcoOnwVJoaWTBrFtEicIWNx4=) Friend, A few minutes ago, Special Counsel Robert Mueller made his first and final public statement regarding his investigation of Russia’s attack on our democracy and Donald Trump’s alleged obstruction of that investigation. And he made two things very clear: _“There were multiple, systematic efforts to interfere in our election. And that allegation deserves the attention of every American.”_ _“If we had confidence that the president did not commit a crime, we would have said so.”_ Friend, the Mueller investigation brought to light critical information about Russia’s attempts to hijack our election and the Trump campaign’s efforts to assist them and then cover it up. But there’s still too much we don’t know. That’s why I’ve been saying for over a year that it’s time to open an impeachment inquiry. Every Member of Congress swore an oath when taking office to uphold and defend the Constitution against all enemies, foreign and domestic. It’s time to put aside political considerations and do what’s right. It’s time to start hearings on impeachment. The Mueller investigation has provided the evidence. It’s up to Congress to examine that evidence and pursue justice to its conclusion, whatever that may be, regardless of the political consequences. Robert Mueller has done his job. Now it’s time for us to do ours. | Team,

No matter what happens in 2020, there will be one person standing in the way of progress: **Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell**. Just take a look at this month's headlines:
_**CBS News:** "Think of me as the Grim Reaper": McConnell vows to thwart Democratic proposals

**SALON:** Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell team up to thwart efforts to secure US elections

**Washington Post:** McConnell calls for end to investigations of Trump, says 'case closed'_ These headlines don't describe a Senate Majority Leader who is working to help the American people. They describe someone hell-bent on protecting President Trump and defeating progress.

**It 's time for Democrats to say NO MORE and defeat Mitch McConnell by winning here in Massachusetts and across the country to flip the Senate blue.**

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: I'm running to be the best president money can't buy.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
I'll be blunt: Now is the time for all Democrats to walk the walk, not just talk the talk.That's how we'll win in 2020: By making it clear that we're fighting for working people. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e439/45c30650/93193280/66998bcf/4154457488/VEsH/ "https://elizabethwarren.com/")
---
We've got a real problem in this country: Money has too much influence on our political leaders.

Candidates spend too much time with wealthy donors behind closed doors -- creating a direct relationship between wealth and access.

It's an old playbook. Other Democratic candidates are living by it, and relying on big donors and fancy fundraising events to pay for big chunks of their campaigns.

The way you fund your campaign influences how you govern and who you fight for. It's only natural: More time with rich people and corporate executives, and it's easier to see the world through their eyes.

**But I 'm running to be the best president money can't buy.** I don't sell my time to rich people, I don't give big donors any special access to me, and I don't take a dime from federal lobbyists or PACs.

**I 'll be blunt: Now is the time for all Democrats to walk the walk, not just talk the talk.

That's how we'll win in 2020: By making it clear that we're fighting for working people, not cozying up to the rich and powerful.

[Our grassroots movement is funded by grassroots donors. And we're up against a big fundraising deadline this Friday. That means I have to ask: If you want to help our campaign keep fighting, will you chip in right now to help make sure we can reach our May fundraising goal?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e439/45c30650/93193280/66998bce/4154457488/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW1heTE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjIwMTkwNTI5ZW0xLWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-may19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190529em1-full")**

Here's a question you can ask all of the candidates: "Where do you get your money? Are you getting it from a bunch of millionaires -- on the phone, or in conference rooms at hedge fund offices, or at fancy receptions and intimate dinners?"

I'm running exactly the type of campaign I want to run: Grassroots, through and through, with grassroots contributions from people like you reading emails like this one.

But usually, on the campaign trail and in Washington, money doesn't just talk. It screams.

It's been estimated that up to 70% of a congressional candidate's time is spent with potential wealthy donors -- trying to get them to give, or as a reward for doing so.

It's safe to assume that goes for presidential campaigns too, and presidential donors are disproportionately white, male, and wealthy.

Look at the 2016 election: The electorate was more diverse than ever, and yet 91% of donors were white. Only 3% of Americans were millionaires, but 17% of donors were.

The wealthy and well-connected have been taught by politicians to expect that more money buys more access -- they've done it for generations, and it too often closes out women and people of color. We have to do things differently.

**We need to fight back against big money on the campaign trail.

Democrats deserve a chance to choose a nominee whose time is not for sale to people who can write big checks. That means proving we can run a campaign solely powered by grassroots donors.**

**[What do you say? Can you pitch in $3 to help fund our campaign? Every grassroots contribution helps our campaign get closer to reaching our May goal and closer to proving Democrats can win without big money.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e439/45c30650/93193280/66998bce/4154457488/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW1heTE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjIwMTkwNTI5ZW0xLWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-may19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190529em1-full")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

subject: bringing you up to speed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there,
Yes, I'm going to ask you for money later in this email. But first I want to fill you in on what I've been up to recently so that you know exactly where my priorities are.
First, I've been outspoken about the abortion bans in Georgia, Alabama, and other states across our country. I'll continue to do everything in my power to defend _Roe v. Wade_ and protect women, just as I have since my very first day in office.
Second, I've fought tooth and nail to end surprise medical bills. Every day, patients receive outrageous, sky-high bills in the mail, and I will keep working across the aisle to pass bipartisan legislation without delay.
Third, I've been focused on protections for veterans. I introduced the bipartisan Green Alert Act to help implement "Green Alert" systems, similar to the AMBER Alert system for children, to locate at-risk veterans when they go missing so that they can receive appropriate care.
**We only won our 2016 race by 1,017 votes and you can bet that Republicans are going to make winning back this seat a top priority. We need to raise $125,000 total this week -- "" Here's the link to give: "" Thanks so much, Kirsten \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Kirsten Gillibrand Date: Tues, May 28, 2019 "" "" Peter, time is running out to hit our May fundraising goal. These goals are really important: They help us set budgets which determine how much I can be on the road, how many staff we can hire and how much we can spend on digital ads to get our message out. So I'm setting a one-day goal right now: "" If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | | "" | "" A bunch of other candidates have already guaranteed their spots on the Democratic debate stage with both their polling and their number of donors. I haven't locked down my spot yet, but I never expected this race to be easy, and I'm used to being an underdog. In fact, in my first election, the only person who thought I could win was my mother, and people told me there were more cows than Democrats in my district. I won that race, and when I ran again, I won by 24 points. And I haven 't lost since. So while some people may be counting me out right now, I know I'm not going to stop running a bold, brave campaign, and I know I have you on my side to help prove the naysayers wrong yet again. All that starts with hitting our May end-of-month goal. Rush a donation right now to help us raise $30,000 before tomorrow morning and make sure we put up a strong May fundraising total --here's the best link: "" Thanks for everything, Kirsten

subject: My request is to please use the link in this email to make a contribution before the end of month fundraising deadline we’ve set for ourselves. Please help us raise the funds we need to win. That’s it. That’s our fundraiser. Pretty simple. Can you help?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2020
body:
I am not going to Nevada to attend a fundraiser hosted by a corporate CEO on the Las Vegas strip.
# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=1486%2E150750%2ECStK7f)

Friends -
In just a few days, we are going to close the books on an end-of-month fundraising deadline we’ve set for our campaign.
Now, this deadline happens to coincide with a trip I am making to Nevada today and tomorrow. But I am not going to Nevada to attend a fundraiser hosted by a corporate CEO on the Las Vegas strip — I am going to Nevada to attend a rally with supporters and a town hall on immigration.
So, that means we are going to host our fundraiser — right here, right now — all across America.
My request is to please use the link below and contribute. Please help us raise the funds we need to win in Iowa, New Hampshire, Nevada, South Carolina, California and states all across this country.
So that’s it...that’s our fundraiser. Pretty simple. But it won’t be a success unless you take the next step. And that’s important ahead of this deadline:
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to our campaign ahead of the important end of month fundraising deadline we’ve set? I cannot do this alone.**](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/11505?refcode=em190529-1-v1-45&t=26&akid=1486%2E150750%2ECStK7f)
We should be very proud of the way that we are funding our campaign. We are raising more money from small-dollar donations faster than probably anyone has before. But we have to keep it up. And this deadline is an important milestone on our path to victory.
So thank you for chipping in.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/11505?refcode=em190529-1-v1-45&t=27&akid=1486%2E150750%2ECStK7f)

PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402

You can also [sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=29&akid=1486%2E150750%2ECStK7f). We hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize and how we raise money. In fact, there is no single greater source for our campaign's fundraising than emails like this one. And that's important, because no one person, not even Bernie Sanders, can take on Trump and the billionaire class alone.

Before you go about the rest of your day, help power our fight against the billionaire class by [making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-email-template?refcode=em-footer&t=30&refcode2=1486_150750_CStK7f&akid=1486%2E150750%2ECStK7f).

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Gallup: Trump leadership rating jumps, beats Obama on issues, ideology
body:
Despite constant negative coverage from the liberal-leaning mainstream media, “Gallup found that 47% [[of Americans] agree with Trump on the issues... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b26299be26&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Gallup: Trump leadership rating jumps, beats Obama on issues, ideology**

Despite constant negative coverage from the liberal-leaning mainstream media, “Gallup found that 47% [of Americans] agree with Trump on the issues, edging Obama at the two year mark of his presidency,” Paul Bedard reports for the _Washington Examiner_.

“And Trump was graded more in line with the political ideology of Americans than Obama and former President George W. Bush.” Over the past two years, as the results from President Trump’s policies—from economic growth to better national security and trade deals on the world stage—have come in, his ratings have steadily gone up.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b8866af256&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “U.S. consumer confidence rose by more than expected to the highest level since November as Americans felt the best about current economic conditions in 18 years, highlighting the effects of a robust labor market and rising wages,” Katia Dmitrieva reports for [_Bloomberg_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8e5d1a6ee7&e=3ee4985eea). “The broad-based gain in sentiment bodes well for consumer spending, which makes up the majority of the U.S. economy, amid unemployment near a five-decade low, sustained wage gains and more affordable mortgages.”
---
|
---
| “Recently, President Donald Trump presented Congress with the new U.S.-Mexico-Canada trade deal (USMCA) that, if passed, will give Texans a major economic victory,” Rep. Roger Williams (R-TX) writes in the [_Dallas Morning News_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=01e3376b63&e=3ee4985eea). “There should be nothing partisan about a deal that adds fuel to our economy, puts money back into consumers' pockets and keeps Main Street booming. We must accept and celebrate a win for America when we get it and push partisan fights aside.”
---
|
---
| “The skies are growing dark and increasingly ominous for dirty officials at the top of Obama-era law enforcement and intelligence agencies,” Charles Lipson writes in [_RealClearPolitics_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=578141e5c6&e=3ee4985eea). “These defenders of the old guard are sliming Attorney General Bill Barr, who heads the investigation into their actions . . . Barr won’t be deterred. He did not return for a second stint as AG to pad his résumé or protect Donald Trump. He returned to clean out the Augean Stables.”
---

name: Dick Durbin
subject: I didn't see any "thugs" or "criminals" at the border
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
[**Can I count on your support as I fight to end President Trump 's cruel immigration policies in the Senate? Contribute $5 to stand with me now.**](http://action.dickdurbin. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-immigration-policy?refcode=em190529&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Peter,
Last month, I visited the U.S.-Mexico border to get a first-hand look at the "national emergency" that President Trump has concocted in order to get his border wall funded in defiance of Congress.
I didn't see any of the "thugs" or "criminals" that he claims are pouring over our borders.
What I did see were families with children fleeing horrific gang and sexual violence in their home countries, utterly exhausted by weeks of travel across some of the harshest terrain.
[**I am fighting back with all I 've got, but I need your support. Chip in $5 right now.**](http://action.dickdurbin. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-immigration-policy?refcode=em190529&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Of all of President Trump's despicable actions over the past two years, his fear-mongering approach to those who come to our border seeking safe haven may rank as his worst.
We need bipartisan comprehensive immigration reform--which includes smart, effective, and humane border security. That is not going to happen as long as President Trump is in the White House and Republicans control the Senate. But we can change that in the next election.
[**It 's time to elect a Democratic Senate and end these inhumane, anti-immigrant policies. If you're all in on this crucial battle, please contribute $5 now to show your support.**](http://action.dickdurbin. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-immigration-policy?refcode=em190529&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
My best,
Dick Durbin

But Senator McConnell is standing in the way of all this progress. Not because he disagrees with it, but because it came from me--a Democrat.

The obstruction has got to stop. But the only way we do that is for Democrats to win here in Massachusetts and across the country to put Senate control back in Democratic hands.

I need your urgent help to take the fight to Mitch McConnell and anyone who stands in the way of progress to flip the Senate blue.

name: Team Beto
subject: Proud to announce this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Beto for America

Today, we’re proud to announce Beto’s new immigration plan. It’s the most
sweeping rewrite of American immigration laws in a generation -- and a
powerful reversal of the Trump administration’s all-out assault on
families.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17604?source=ema20190529-33364&t=1001&akid=33364%2E444211%2EO9nDDq ]Take a moment to read the plan, and add your name as a supporter for
our new vision for immigration here.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17604?source=ema20190529-33364&t=1002&akid=33364%2E444211%2EO9nDDq ]Add your name »

The plan hinges on the core belief that immigrants make our society
stronger -- and it includes three key pillars:

1. End cruel border policies immediately. On day one of his presidency,
Beto will use executive authority to stop the inhumane treatment of
children, reunite families that have been separated, reform our asylum
system, rescind the travel bans, and remove the fear of deportation
for Dreamers and beneficiaries of programs like TPS.

2. Pass historic legislation to ensure citizenship and full opportunity.
In his first 100 days, Beto will put the full weight of the presidency
behind passing legislation through Congress that creates a pathway to
citizenship for 11 million undocumented people, fast-tracks Dreamers
and beneficiaries of programs like TPS, makes naturalization easier
for nearly nine million already eligible immigrants by waiving fees
and providing pre-filled applications, enable community visa
sponsorship, and raise visa caps.

3. Restore U.S. standing globally by being a partner for prosperity and
security in Latin America. Finally, the plan would focus on root
problems in the Northern Triangle by convening our regional partners
and more than doubling investment with $5 billion in Central America
to fight violence and poverty while bolstering our shared security and
prosperity.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17604?source=ema20190529-33364&t=1003&akid=33364%2E444211%2EO9nDDq ]Join us in our fight to rewrite America’s immigration laws in our own
image. Read Beto’s full plan and sign on here.

America urgently needs a new path forward that welcomes immigrants and
allows every person to live up to their potential -- no matter whether
your family has been in this country for decades or whether you got here
yesterday. Only then can we live up to our values, our promise, and our
greatness as a country. Now is the time to act.

-- Team Beto

P.S. We’re sharing stories that shine a light on the immense contributions
that immigrants make to our communities and economy. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/share-immigration-story/?source=ema20190529-33364&t=1004&akid=33364%2E444211%2EO9nDDq ]If you have a
personal story that you’d like to share, please let us know here.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17006?refcode=ema20190529-33364&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1005&akid=33364%2E444211%2EO9nDDq ]Contribute »

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-for-america-emails?refcode=em20190529footer&t=1006&refcode2=33364_444211_O9nDDq&akid=33364%2E444211%2EO9nDDq

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1007&akid=33364%2E444211%2EO9nDDq

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

Not only is this our chance to turn Georgia blue, the road to flipping the Senate goes directly through our state. It’s up to us to make sure our financial backing is as strong as our support on the ground.
Chip in now to support Teresa’s campaign for Senate, and invest in a better future for Georgia and our great country. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-eom#?refcode=em052919-b]

Edana

| Team -- The country just heard from Robert Mueller -- what must happen now is clear: **Congress has a legal and moral obligation to begin impeachment proceedings immediately.** Mueller laid it out as plainly as he could, saying, "If we had had confidence that the President did not commit a crime, we would have said so... body:
#
Team,
We wanted to make sure you saw this: Wilmot's wife, Maddie, sent her first ever message to the campaign team yesterday.
[**Take a moment to read Maddie's message below and then contribute $5 to join this campaign right now.**](https://act.wilmotcollins. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-email?refcode=em190529&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Thank you,
Team Wilmot
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.wilmotcollins. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-email?refcode=em190529&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

\---Original Message from Maddie Collins---
Team,
My name is Maddie Collins. I fled Liberia in 1990 during the bloody civil war that killed 250,000 Liberians. I barely escaped. It was with my husband, Wilmot that we escaped starvation and death.
I'm proud to stand beside my husband, my best friend and my life partner today and every day.
[**Show Wilmot you support him by donating $5 today.**](https://act.wilmotcollins. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-email?refcode=em190529&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
When Wilmot and I were separated for nearly 3 years, I always fought for him as he fought to get back to me.
His fight to reunite our family, torn apart by civil war, is the same way he will fight for Montana, always.
Wilmot is a fighter for those who need a hand up. He's fought for others his whole career. Now, we're in for the fight of our lives to save America, restore the promise of this country, and preserve our planet. We have no time to waste getting started.
[**Your $5 contribution is a powerful way to invest in Wilmot's candidacy and show you're part of this movement. Contribute to take ownership in this campaign now.**](https://act.wilmotcollins. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-email?refcode=em190529&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Thank you for your support,
Maddie Collins

subject: Canvass for Yasmine this Sunday!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
Yasmine Taeb--a progressive Democrat--is running in the most important election in Virginia this summer.
# [](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a4f0/bed43eb/95a33e0e/75fa9924/4050461560/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-header-OR")
Dear Friends,
This Sunday we have a chance to make sure Yasmine Taeb---a progressive Democrat running for State Senate--wins in the most important election in Virginia this summer.
The only way she'll win a seat at the State Senate is if we're able to contact the thousands of voters at the door who need to hear her message for the Commonwealth. That's why I'm asking for your help.
[**Will you join me this Sunday, June 2 at 11 am in Falls Church, Virginia to canvass for Yasmine?**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a4f0/bed43eb/95a33e0e/75fa9927/4050461560/VEsE/ "https://www.mobilize.us/yasmineforvirginia/event/93639/")
Yasmine and I served on the Democratic National Committee together to make the Democratic Party more inclusive, transparent, and accountable. She is the type of leader we need in the Virginia Assembly.
Yasmine is running against a 40-year corporate Democrat who takes hundreds of thousands of dollars from the fossil fuel industry, predatory lenders, and tobacco companies. In stark contrast, she only takes money from individual donors. Please consider donating to her progressive campaign here: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/yasmine-taeb-for-virginia-1](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a4f0/bed43eb/95a33e0e/75fa9926/4050461560/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/yasmine-taeb-for-virginia-1").
If you have any questions about this or future events, please contact Field Director Dan Ford at [dmford13@gmail.com](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a4f0/bed43eb/95a33e0e/75fa9921/4050461560/VEsC/ "http://dmford@gmail.com") or at 703-232-3532.
**[RSVP to Canvass on Sunday](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a4f0/bed43eb/95a33e0e/75fa9927/4050461560/VEsD/ "https://www.mobilize.us/yasmineforvirginia/event/93639/")**

In Solidarity,
Larry Cohen
Board Chair

body:

Earlier today, Special Counsel Robert Mueller made his first public statement since releasing his report to Attorney General Bill Barr last month. After listening to him, it’s clear Mueller didn’t return charges against Trump because of a Department of Justice memo saying a sitting president can’t be indicted -- not because his investigation determined crimes were not committed. Mueller’s impartial investigation presented the American people with indictable evidence and information -- and after his statement today, Congress must take action and begin the impeachment process. **Here is the bottom line: I’m running for president to bring integrity and decency back to the White House. subject: Press Secretary Sarah Sanders responds to the end of the Special Counsel investigation
body:
This morning, Special Counsel Robert Mueller announced the completion of his investigation with a short, prepared address...

https://www.whitehouse.gov/1600daily/
The White House • May 29, 2019

** Press Secretary Sarah Sanders responds to the end of the Special Counsel investigation
------------------------------------------------------------
This morning, Special Counsel Robert Mueller announced the completion of his investigation with a short, prepared address from the Department of Justice headquarters.

White House Press Secretary Sarah Sanders issued the following statement:

“The Special Counsel has completed the investigation, closed his office, and has closed the case. Mr. Mueller explicitly said that he has nothing to add beyond the report, and therefore, does not plan to testify before Congress. The report was clear—there was no collusion, no conspiracy—and the Department of Justice confirmed there was no obstruction. Special Counsel Mueller also stated that Attorney General Barr acted in good faith in his handling of the report. After two years, the Special Counsel is moving on with his life, and everyone else should do the same.”
After a two-year, $35 million investigation that involved 500 witnesses, 500 search warrants, and 2,800 subpoenas, the Special Counsel’s office found no evidence that President Donald J. Trump, any member of his campaign team, or indeed any American citizen conspired with Russia to influence the 2016 presidential election.

It’s time to move forward. Mueller announced that he will step down from his role at the Department of Justice now that his investigation is complete, and he concluded today’s remarks by calling on Americans to unite against a real threat: “multiple, systematic efforts” by a foreign government to interfere with our country.

“That allegation deserves the attention of every American,” he said.

>From day one, President Trump has taken action to defend America from Russian meddling. The Trump Administration has maintained the closure of 2 Russian compounds—and the expulsion of 35 diplomats—in response to Russian interference in the 2016 election. Last April, the Administration also imposed sanctions against 7 Russian oligarchs, 12 companies they own or control, and 17 senior Russian officials to ensure the oligarchs who profit from Russia’s destabilizing activities face consequences.

“We have been far tougher on Russia than anybody—anybody,” the President says.

President Trump knows that a strong, united, and energy-independent America is the last thing Russia wants to see. An internally divided, dysfunctional Washington, on the other hand, would give Moscow the victory it craves. Which path will Congress choose?

President Trump has stood up to Russia since day one. (https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trump-standing-russias-malign-activities/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)

Vice President Pence: It’s time for Democrats to focus on the American people. (https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/statement-office-vice-president-4/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)

** Protect the social safety net for American citizens
------------------------------------------------------------
President Trump took an important action last week to protect America’s social safety net for those who need it most. In a new memorandum (https://www.whitehouse.gov/presidential-actions/memorandum-enforcing-legal-responsibilities-sponsors-aliens/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) , the President is directing Federal agencies to fully enforce existing restrictions on the use—and misuse—of income-based welfare programs by non-citizens.

Vast numbers of non-citizens and their families take advantage of our welfare programs. Today, 78 percent of households headed by a non-citizen with no more than a high school education use at least one welfare program. And nearly 60 percent of all households headed by a non-citizen do so.

In 1996, President Bill Clinton signed legislation that required each sponsor of a non-citizen to reimburse the government for any income-based welfare benefits that the non-citizen receives. Since then, the law has been unevenly enforced, putting real strain on the financial support provided for struggling Americans.

With his latest action, President Trump has tasked agencies with issuing guidance to ensure these payments are recovered from sponsors going forward—just as the law says.

To protect benefits for citizens, immigrants must be financially self-sufficient. (https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trump-taking-action-protect-social-safety-net-promote-self-sufficiency-non-citizens/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)

In case you missed it: President Trump’s bold immigration plan for the 21st century (https://www.whitehouse.gov/articles/president-trumps-bold-immigration-plan-21st-century/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)

** Photo of the Day
------------------------------------------------------------
Official White House Photo by Joyce N. Boghosian
Roses bloom in the Rose Garden | May 29, 2019
